puretorch.optim package#

Submodules#

puretorch.optim.optimizer module#

class puretorch.optim.optimizer.Optimizer(params)[source]#

Bases: object

Base class for all optimizers :param params: iterable of PureTorch.Tensor’s. Parameters to optimized

abstractmethod step()[source]#

Performs a single optimization step on all given params (updates the parameters)

zero_grad(set_to_none: bool = False)[source]#

Sets the gradients of all the parameters given to the optimizer :param set_to_none: sets the grads to None if True, sets the grads to zero otherwise.

puretorch.optim.sgd module#

class puretorch.optim.sgd.SGD(params: list[Tensor], lr: float = 0.001, momentum: float = 0.9)[source]#

Bases: Optimizer

step()[source]#

Performs a single optimization step using vanilla SGD (no momentum). Updates the parameters with new values using the learning rate and their gradients.

Formula:

param.data -= lr * param.grad

Where, param.data is the parameter’s value and param.grad is the parameters gradient w.r.t. the loss.

Module contents#

class puretorch.optim.Optimizer(params)[source]#

Bases: object

Base class for all optimizers :param params: iterable of PureTorch.Tensor’s. Parameters to optimized

abstractmethod step()[source]#

Performs a single optimization step on all given params (updates the parameters)

zero_grad(set_to_none: bool = False)[source]#

Sets the gradients of all the parameters given to the optimizer :param set_to_none: sets the grads to None if True, sets the grads to zero otherwise.

class puretorch.optim.SGD(params: list[Tensor], lr: float = 0.001, momentum: float = 0.9)[source]#

Bases: Optimizer

step()[source]#

Performs a single optimization step using vanilla SGD (no momentum). Updates the parameters with new values using the learning rate and their gradients.

Formula:

param.data -= lr * param.grad

Where, param.data is the parameter’s value and param.grad is the parameters gradient w.r.t. the loss.
